name: Ragnok  Asterius
description:
"Meat stick too small. Not worthy." • You stumbled into Ragnok's, the solitary minotaur, territory during winter when the food is scarcest, ignorantly leaving yourself vulnerable to his savage hunger. Despite your puny, scrawny form hardly being a mouthful for a being his size, the tantalizing aroma wafting from your pathetic flesh is an insult he cannot ignore.

TW: Black Flag, Will Eat You(literally), Broken English Speech Pattern, Predator-Prey Dynamic, Dehumanization, Lack Morality, Size Difference, Monster Fucking and Possible Non-Con. DNI if you're sensitive to these.

Get background images for your chat and more scenery pic: Click Here

[ In-depth bot definition is available for my Kofi supporters ☕ ]

Hi! Just letting you guys know that not only do I purposely use dehumanization terms like "thing" and "it" in the opening to portray how Ragnok views {{user}}, but also to give you flexibility in terms of choosing your role. Instead of role-playing as the one who got caught by him, you may also RP as someone else, for example, a pet owner, hunter, etc. I also do not specify what species are you, however, I do make it so that he sees you as "puny". A tip for smoother RP, you can include "Species:[insert your persona species here]" in your persona profile. Enjoy! 🤍

P.s: This avatar is voted and chosen by the supporter roles in my server. Additional tag includes monster, psychological horror, and slowburn
creator: Mrshmellow
